editions.description: Selected in the top 50 out of 1000+ teams for the maze-solver robot theme. Working on the embedded firmware and control logic.
Developed a two-wheeled self-balancing robot. Implemented LQR-based control logic for stable balancing and navigation.
Proposed Dynamic Floating Hydrogen Islands - an integrated offshore infrastructure concept for renewable-powered green hydrogen production.
Designed and built a high-speed autonomous line-following robot capable of maintaining accurate path tracking under aggressive operating conditions.
Showcased the PosturePro belt, a portable posture correction prototype, recognized as a finalist for its impactful application in biomedical hardware.
Led the R&D for a portable posture correction belt prototype, focusing on the hardware-software integration.
